title: codec.py: needs_value condition duplicated across files
description:
src/lichen/schc/codec.py:137-141 has a complex condition:
    needs_value = fd.mo in (MO.EQUAL, MO.MSB, MO.MATCH_MAPPING) or fd.cda in (CDA.VALUE_SENT, CDA.LSB, CDA.MAPPING_SENT)

Same pattern appears in context.py:31-35. Should be a method on FieldDescriptor: fd.requires_value().
